rule: Automation assets are generated with the Build Package so QA does not recreate tests later.

scenario: Full lifecycle test: create -> Create HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Edit HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Submit HumanResources for Review -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Review HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Approve HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Reject HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Archive HumanResources Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Audit Trail Capture -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Notify Stakeholders -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
Full lifecycle test: create -> Generate HumanResources Report -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
